Name: FColorParameterNameAndCurves
Description: Structure representing an animated vector parameter and it's associated animation curve.

Variables.Name: ParameterName
Variables.Description: The name of the vector parameter which is being animated.

Variables.Name: RedCurve
Variables.Description: The curve which contains the animation data for the red component of the color parameter.

Variables.Name: GreenCurve
Variables.Description: The curve which contains the animation data for the green component of the color parameter.

Variables.Name: BlueCurve
Variables.Description: The curve which contains the animation data for the blue component of the color parameter.

Variables.Name: AlphaCurve
Variables.Description: The curve which contains the animation data for the alpha component of the color parameter.
